title: Expressing Desire to See Someone
prompt: Write a short message expressing your desire to see someone.
hint: Use phrases like 'I want to see you' or 'I would like to meet you'.
sample: I want to see you soon.

ja.prompt: 誰かに会いたい気持ちを表現する短いメッセージを書いてください。
ja.hint: 'I want to see you'や'I would like to meet you'のようなフレーズを使いましょう。
ja.sample: I want to see you soon.

zh.prompt: 寫一則表達你想見某人的簡短訊息。
zh.hint: 使用像是 'I want to see you' 或 'I would like to meet you' 的片語。
zh.sample: I want to see you soon.
